xc.d:
n the cardinal number that is the product of ten and nine
s being ten more than eighty

xcg.t: abbr. experimental cargo glider (naval symbol) 实验运载滑翔机（海军符号）（代号）

xci.d: s being one more than ninety

xciii.d: s being three more than ninety

xcit.t: abbr. excitation 刺激; 兴奋; 激动; 激励

xcl.t: abbr. excess current liabilities 短期债务逾额（代号）
xcl.d: s being ten more than one hundred eighty

xcopy.t:
[计] DOS外部命令:是对COPY命令的加强
             如果需要拷贝包含所有子目录在内的整个目录, 使用该命令是很方便的

xcr.t: abbr. Crystal Controlled Receiver 晶体控制接收机

xcu.t: abbr. excuse 原谅; 申辩; extra-care unit 特别护理单元（代号）; extreme close-up 大特写镜头

xcut.t: (=cross-cut)横割, 横切, 剖面, [矿]横巷, X切割(垂直于X轴的石英晶体截割法)

xcv.d: s being five more than ninety

xcviii.d: s being eight more than ninety
